subject: FW: Jane Doe
body:
Thank you for the email, however, in briefly reviewing LM's responses, she mentions a Dr. Rishard. I have previously asked your office to provide Dr. Rishard's contact information. I have looked for an "Office of Palm Beach Doctors" and and a "Dr. Rishard" and have been unable to locate either. Please provide me with contact information so that I may obtain records. Thank you.

---
*Certified Paralegal*
*Florida Registered Paralegal*
**BURMAN CRITTON LUTTIER & COLEMAN, LLP**
515 N. Flagler Drive
Suite #400
West Palm Beach, FL 33401
████████████████████████
